summary: Comprehensive testing of DressApp fashion ecosystem completed. Frontend and backend integration working well with vision stack swap successfully implemented.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Authentication token not being recognized properly in some curl requests
flaky_endpoints.impact: Image editing functionality may have auth issues

integration_issues.flow: Direct URL navigation to protected routes
integration_issues.issue: Some protected routes require login flow rather than direct navigation

passed_tests: Login page renders with split-screen hero image
Dev bypass button works and redirects to /home
Home page shows hero section, closet count (26), active listings (8), 7% platform fee
Top navigation (desktop) with all 4 links functional
Avatar dropdown menu includes Transactions entry
Transactions page renders with Purchases/Sales tabs and proper data-testid attributes
Closet page grid renders items with source badges (Private/Shared/Retail)
Closet filters and search functionality present
Add item page allows URL-based image upload with category selection
Stylist page shows chat history and structured outfit recommendations
Stylist page displays TTS audio and weather context
Market page browse tab shows listings with source tags and net seller amounts
Market page filters work and Create listing button navigates properly
Sign-out flow clears token and redirects to login
Bottom tabs navigation works on mobile (all 5 tabs functional)
Vision stack regression: POST /api/v1/closet with image_base64 returns 201 with segmented_image_url
Fee preview endpoint returns correct 7% math (stripe_fee 102, platform_fee 168, seller_net 2230)
